summary: Earth visualization project with time controls panel migration. Moving controls (Real/Hourly/Yearly toggles and time button) from right bottom panel to below Day/Night Terminator and Twilight Zone controls, one by one, then removing the right bottom panel.
architectural_notes: Controls are being migrated incrementally (one at a time) to avoid token limit issues that caused previous failed attempts
known_issues: Previous attempts to move the fixed time controls panel hit token limits and failed; reverted to version 1147

new_feature_requests.summary: Move time button from right bottom panel to below Day/Night Terminator and Twilight Zone controls
Move Real/Hourly/Yearly toggles from right bottom panel to below Day/Night Terminator and Twilight Zone controls
Completely remove the right bottom panel after all controls have been duplicated/moved

In InteractiveGlobe.tsx, locate the time button that currently lives in the fixed right bottom panel and render a duplicate of it in the left-side controls panel, positioned directly below the Day/Night Terminator and Twilight Zone toggle controls. The duplicated button must be fully functional (same onClick handler, same state bindings) and visually consistent with the existing controls in that area.
